name: part_002
file: tmp_【Ayunda Risu 3D Birthday】The Rise of the NUT Warrior 【#TheNutWarrior】 [VYSAfYJ6FhI]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_002.webm

scenes.description: Ayunda Risu and Nerissa Ravencroft perform a duet cover of 'Lion'.

subtitles.original:
ライオン
Lyrics: Gabriela Robin  Music: Gabriela Robin
subtitles.english:
Lion
Lyrics: Gabriela Robin  Music: Gabriela Robin

subtitles.original: 星を廻せ　世界のまんなかで
subtitles.english: Spin the stars, in the middle of the world

subtitles.original: くしゃみすればどこかの森で蝶が乱舞
subtitles.english: If I sneeze, butterflies will dance in some forest

subtitles.original: 君が守るドアのかぎで　ただ目覚める
subtitles.english: I simply wake up with the key to the door you protect

subtitles.original: はずかしいほど　かたすみで
subtitles.english: Strong is the lion licking its wounds

subtitles.original: なめ合ってるライオンはつよい
subtitles.english: In a corner so shameful

subtitles.original: 生き残りたい　生き残りたい
subtitles.english: I want to survive, I want to survive

subtitles.original: まだ生きてたくなる
subtitles.english: I still want to stay alive

subtitles.original: 星座の導きで　いま、見つめ合った
subtitles.english: Guided by the constellations, our eyes met just now

subtitles.original: 生き残りたい　途方に暮れて
subtitles.english: I want to survive, at my wit's end

subtitles.original: キラリ枯れてゆく
subtitles.english: Sparkling and withering away

subtitles.original: 本気のカラダ　見せつけるまで
subtitles.english: Until I show you my true self

subtitles.original: 私、眠らない
subtitles.english: I will not sleep

subtitles.original: 風はやがて　東へ向かうだろう
subtitles.english: The wind will eventually head east

subtitles.original: 高気圧のこの星の今日を　覆うそう
subtitles.english: And likely cover today on this high-pressure planet

subtitles.original: 誘い水　飲んだ胸がつらい
subtitles.english: My chest hurts from drinking the decoy water

subtitles.original: 遠巻きな物語　かじり合う
subtitles.english: Distant stories, gnawing at each other

subtitles.original: 骨の髄まで
subtitles.english: To the marrow of our bones

subtitles.original: 生き残りたい　生き残りたい
subtitles.english: I want to survive, I want to survive

subtitles.original: まだ生きてたくなる
subtitles.english: I still want to stay alive

subtitles.original: 星座の導きで　いま、見つめ合った
subtitles.english: Guided by the constellations, our eyes met just now

subtitles.english: I want to survive, at my wit's end

subtitles.original: キラリ枯れてゆく
subtitles.english: Sparkling and withering away

subtitles.original: 本気のカラダ　見せつけるまで
subtitles.english: Until I show you my true self

subtitles.original: 私、眠らない
subtitles.english: I will not sleep

subtitles.original: 何しに生まれたの？
subtitles.english: What were we born for?

subtitles.original: 何しにここにいる？
subtitles.english: What are we doing here?

subtitles.original: 生き残りたい　埋まらない傷
subtitles.english: I want to survive, I was afraid of the light

subtitles.original: 光　恐れてた
subtitles.english: On my unhealable wounds

subtitles.original: 許された命が　いま、惹かれ合った
subtitles.english: Pardoned lives have now been drawn together

subtitles.original: さまよい果てて　君のとなりで　火照り　沈めて
subtitles.english: At my wandering's end, I calm my flush by your side

subtitles.original: 本気のカラダ　見せつけるまで
subtitles.english: Until I show you my true self

subtitles.original: 私、眠らない
subtitles.english: I will not sleep

subtitles.original: 生き残りたい　崖っぷちでいい
subtitles.english: I want to survive, even on a cliff's edge

subtitles.original: 君を愛してる
subtitles.english: I love you

subtitles.original: 目覚めた本能が　いま、惹かれ合った
subtitles.english: Awakened instincts have now been drawn together

subtitles.original: 狂気に変えて　祈り捧ぐよ
subtitles.english: Turning it into madness, I offer my prayers

subtitles.original: 君を愛してる
subtitles.english: I love you

subtitles.original: 星座の導きで...
subtitles.english: Guided by the constellations...

subtitles.original: 生き残りたい　まだ生きたいよ
subtitles.english: I want to survive, I still want to live

subtitles.original: 君を愛してる
subtitles.english: I love you

subtitles.original: 本気の心　見せつけるまで
subtitles.english: Until I show you my true heart
